case_title: RICHARD DI BERNARDO VS. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF RICHARD DI BERNARDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TITO DANGER BURNS, AUTO DAMAGE ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JAN-02-2020
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED SEP-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DI BERNARDO, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DI BERNARDO, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO. $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-22-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RICHARD DI BERNARDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DI BERNARDO, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
